priority_basis: Continue the newest authenticated Unicode identifier-admission line and close the explicitly documented default-ignorable security-profile gap before starting unrelated research.

completed.action: Add a fail-closed UTS #39-oriented Default_Ignorable_Code_Point exclusion profile that composes with the existing admission interface and blocks registry mutation before rejection.

verification: Five deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical pre-commit files; syntax check also passed.

claim_boundaries.default_ignorable_free: No scalar in the NFC-normalized identifier appears in the authenticated Default_Ignorable_Code_Point ranges.
claim_boundaries.admissible: The base admission result and default-ignorable exclusion are both true; this does not establish script safety, bidi safety, or benign intent.
claim_boundaries.contextual_allowance: Not implemented; joining controls and variation selectors are denied by default rather than contextually admitted.

handoff: Integrate the profile with buildUnicodeIdentifierAdmissionWithSyntax using the already authenticated DerivedCoreProperties digest, run the combined suite and full Unicode 17.0.0 data, then address script restriction levels as a separate gate.
shared_state_policy: Additive queue update only; canonical ACTIVE_QUEUE.json and other teams' records were not overwritten.
